text:
Created attachment 225657
0001-multimedia-plexmediaserver-Update-to-1.23.2.4656.patch

Plex has pulled 1.23.2.4625 since it has a lot of problems in the configuration area of the mediaserver.

See:
- https://forums.plex.tv/t/why-did-plex-downgrade-the-beta-version/720479
- https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/435
